basic_details.job_title: DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Administration of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu (DNH & DD)
basic_details.short_information: Administration of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu (DNH & DD) has released the official Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 27/UTEODM/C/SFRDR/2023-24/01. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a Graduation degree in any discipline, a one-year Computer Diploma/Certificate, a typing speed of 40 words per minute, and knowledge of MS Office Suite, Adobe Reader, Internet, and E-mail can apply through Email on or before 07 August 2026. The official notification PDF a

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in any discipline, Typing speed of 40 wpm, Diploma/ Certificate Course (1 year) in Computers, Knowledge of MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.), Adobe Reader, Internet, E-Mail, etc.
qualification.details: Graduation in any discipline. Typing speed of 40 wpm. Diploma/Certificate Course (1 year) in Computers. Knowledge of MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.), Adobe Reader, Internet, E-Mail, etc. Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar position. Desirable: Knowledge of Government rules and procedures.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DNH & DD Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduation in any discipline. Typing speed of 40 wpm. Diploma/Certificate Course (1 year) in Computers. Knowledge of MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.), Adobe Reader, Internet, E-Mail, etc. Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar position. Desirable: Knowledge of Government rules and procedures.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DNH & DD Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DNH & DD Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 07 August 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Graduation in any discipline, a typing speed of 40 wpm, and a 1-year Diploma/Certificate Course in Computers. Knowledge of MS Office Suite and other basic computer applications is also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Data Entry Operator position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 22,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DNH & DD Data Entry Operator job?
faq.answer: The application process is via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Does the notification mention any experience required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 years of experience in a similar position is required. Knowledge of Government rules and procedures is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: The Data Entry Operator position is on a contractual basis.
